title: Atacames Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Atacames with a Z-Score of +3.54. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Atacames are characterized by high temperatures and moderate humidity, with an Umidita of 66% and Vento of 8.9 km/h.
The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 11.4 GG, while Heating Degree Days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG.
This anomaly is expected to have a substantial impact on various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy production.
conclusion: Monitoring and mitigation measures should be implemented immediately to address the critical heat wave in Atacames.
agri_impact: Crop damage and yield loss expected
